Incident: Bumped on jumping. Shifted to the outside of YOUNG CHAMPION near the 350 Metres and made contact with LUCKY WITH YOU. Sent for sampling post-race.
Slow to begin. Sent for sampling post-race.
Shortly after the start was bumped by AKASHAVANI which shifted out.
Near the 350 Metres was bumped by PATCH OF STARS which shifted to the outside of YOUNG CHAMPION to improve. Apprentice H Y Yuen reported that under pressure in the Home Straight her mount lay in.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Shortly after the start was then steadied when crowded between PATCH OF STARS and YOUNG CHAMPION which shifted in.
Raced wide and without cover for the majority of the event.
Apprentice P N Wong stated that her instructions were to go forward and attempt to lead. She said despite riding her mount along in the early stages it failed to show sufficient pace to do so.

Near the 1100 Metres shifted in and made contact with VICTOR THE WINNER. J Orman stated that the instructions were to go forward. He said when INVINCIBLE SAGE jumped well he was able to comply with those instructions. Trainer D J Hall confirmed the instructions and stated that he issued those instructions as he was of the opinion there was not strong pace drawn to the horse’s inside. A veterinary inspection immediately following the race did not show any significant findings.

Shifted in at the start and was bumped. Raced keenly in the early stages. B Avdulla stated that after improving making the Home Turn behind LADY’S CHOICE his mount failed to respond to his riding in the Home Straight which he attributed to it not appreciating the "Good to Yielding” track conditions. A veterinary inspection immediately following the race did not show any significant findings.
